description: §21.2 Form 1 — an `export <Card title:string>` whose outer attr (`title`) differs from the body-root attr (`id`) has no collision; E-EXPORT-003 stays silent.
rationale: §21.2 Form 1: distinct outer and body-root attribute names splice cleanly. `title` (outer) vs `id` (body root) do not collide, so E-EXPORT-003 must not fire — the clean twin of the attr-conflict case.
